topic: word problem involving adding and evaluating linear expressions
latex:
You and your friend catch tadpoles. After $t$ minutes, you have $(7t + 5)$ tadpoles and your friend has $(8t - 3)$ tadpoles.

\textbf{a.} Write an expression that represents the total number of tadpoles you both caught.

\textbf{b.} Who has more tadpoles after 9 minutes?
